name: ButtonGroup
description: Segmented control composed of ButtonGroupItem segments with collapsed shared borders. 3 sizes, optional left/right/icon-only per segment, one active (selected) segment.

items.type: Array<{ label?: ReactNode; icon?: string; leftIcon?: string; rightIcon?: string; disabled?: boolean; onClick?: () => void }>

value.description: Index of the currently selected segment (renders as the Active state)

accessibility.role: group, with each segment as a real <button aria-pressed>
